summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Header and Footer components across all 4 pages. Header sticky functionality, active page highlighting, mobile menu, and footer elements all working correctly. Fixed minor active link logic issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Click interception issue when closing mobile menu with X button
ui_bugs.workaround: Backdrop click and nav link clicks work correctly for closing menu

passed_tests: Header is sticky with z-index 1000 and shadow appears on scroll
Active page highlighting: 'Home' is blue with underline on homepage (/)
Active page highlighting: 'Insurance Tips' is blue with underline on /insurance-tips
Active page highlighting: 'Quote Center' is blue with underline on /quote-center
Desktop nav links: Home, Insurance Tips, Quote Center + Get Quote pill button all present
Mobile hamburger opens full-screen slide-in overlay from right with dark navy (#1E3A5F) background
Mobile menu has close (X) button, white nav links, active page in gold, gold Get Quote button at bottom
Mobile menu closes when clicking backdrop or clicking a nav link
Body scroll is locked when mobile menu is open and restored when closed
Footer shows 'Contact Us Today' title and subtitle
Footer email with pink icon: info@pinoygeneralinsurance.com
Footer has Facebook and LinkedIn social icons that open in new tab
Footer right column has name input form and full-width blue 'Get a Quote' button
Footer logo image displays below the form
Footer copyright shows '2025' with border-top separator
Header and Footer render consistently on all pages (/, /insurance-tips, /quote-center, /auto-insurance)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Mobile menu close button has click interception issue. Consider adding force=true to click handler or adjusting z-index layering.
